description: These ethnic look kitten heels from catwalk are given a fresh twist with gorgeous bead and stone work. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses, jeans and ethnic wear.UpperT- straps with heavy embellishment for comfort and styleMetallic faux leather lining for greater comfortSynthetic leather lined footbed with gold print in an ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleKitten heels with textured sidesTextured horizontal grooves on the outsole for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
